# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

List the main files, routes, tools or documentation areas affected.

## Checklist

- [ ] No patient-identifiable data are included.
- [ ] No real clinical cases are included.
- [ ] No clinical form values are stored, sent or logged.
- [ ] No clinical analytics data are added.
- [ ] Evidence source is provided for clinical changes.
- [ ] DOI, PMID or official URL is included when possible.
- [ ] License/copyright implications have been reviewed.
- [ ] Tests are added or updated when behavior changes.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] `npm run test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes.
- [ ] `npm run seo:check` passes if public routes, SEO metadata or sitemap behavior changed.
- [ ] No therapeutic recommendation is added unless explicitly in scope and reviewed.

## Clinical Safety Notes

Describe any clinical wording, evidence, implementation-status or licensing considerations. If not applicable, write `Not applicable`.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots only when useful and only if they contain no patient data or real clinical cases.
